ohtani.title: Mookie Betts, Andy Pages power Dodgers' 15-6 win
ohtani.blurb: Mookie Betts hits two home runs and Andy Pages records four hits in the Dodgers' 15-6 win over the Rockies

imanaga.title: Astros' three homers ignite 8-5 win over Cubs
imanaga.blurb: Jake Meyers, Nick Allen and Christian Walker's home runs power Astros' 8-5 win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Valdez's homer, Ashcraft's start fuel Pirates' win
suzuki.blurb: Esmerlyn Valdez hits a two-run home run and Braxton Ashcraft strikes out five in the Pirates' 12-1 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Michael Harris II's three RBIs lead Braves' 7-6 win
yoshida.blurb: Michael Harris II drives in three runs and Matt Olson hits a two-run homer in the Braves 7-6 comeback win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Jesús Sánchez's grand slam powers Blue Jays' 8-1 win
okamoto.blurb: Jesús Sánchez crushes a grand slam and Ernie Clement goes yard to power the Blue Jays' 8-1 win over the Marlins

murakami.title: Brooks Lee lifts Twins in extras for 5-3 win
murakami.blurb: Brooks Lee hits a go-ahead three-run double in the 11th inning and Joe Ryan strikes out nine batters in the Twins' 5-3 win over the White Sox

matsui.title: Kyle Schwarber hits 21st homer in Phillies' 3-0 win
matsui.blurb: Kyle Schwarber hits his 21st homer and Jesús Luzardo strikes out six in the Phillies' 3-0 win over the Padres
